<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelIgnition\Recorders\DumpRecorder; class Dump { protected string $htmlDump; protected ?string $file; protected ?int $lineNumber; protected float $microtime; public function __construct(string $htmlDump, ?string $file, ?int $lineNumber, ?float $microtime = null) { $this->htmlDump = $htmlDump; $this->file = $file; $this->lineNumber = $lineNumber; $this->microtime = $microtime ?? microtime(true); } /** @return array<string, mixed> */ public function toArray(): array { return [ 'html_dump' => $this->htmlDump, 'file' => $this->file, 'line_number' => $this->lineNumber, 'microtime' => $this->microtime, ]; } }
